Input file size: 102400 bytes
Output file size: 65536 bytes

      Data was silently truncated or corrupted

Processed /tmp/input.dat -> /tmp/output.dat (65536 bytes)

cmd: sed -i 's/let mut buffer = \[0u8; BUFFER_SIZE\];/    let mut buffer = Vec::new();/' /app/src/main.rs

sed -i 's/let bytes_read = file.read(&mut buffer)?;/
    file.read_to_end(&mut buffer)?;/' /app/src/main.rs

sed -i 's/let bytes_read = file.read(&mut buffer)?;\n    let data = &buffer\[..bytes_read\];/
    file.read_to_end(&mut buffer)?;\
    let data = &buffer;/' /app/src/main.rs

cmd:
sed -i 's/if let Err(e) = process_file(input, output) {/                match process_file(input, output) {\
                    Ok(_) => { \/\* Success, nothing more to do \*\/ },\
                    Err(e) => {\
                        eprintln!(\"Error processing file: {:?}\", e); \/\/ Print the full error\
                        process::exit(1);\
                    }
                }/' /app/src/main.rs
